ai_summary: Elysia combines nearly 22 years of childcare experience with special education background, showing deep emotional intelligence in guiding children through conflicts and teaching meaningful apologies. Her cross-age expertise from infants to school-age and genuine passion for understanding each child's needs makes her an exceptional educator.
